programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Research, restore and ready for sale! An intrepid team of antiques experts and master crafters help families turn unwanted items into winning lots.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Quiz show hosted by Adil Ray in which three pairs of contestants use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords.

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: Tom Gleeson and his Big Brass Mug test the mettle of average Aussies with eccentric interests, such as the LA Dodgers baseball team, Project Mercury space program, Lawrence of Arabia, and '60s comedy.

programme.title: The Chase New Zealand
programme.desc: Freeman, Julyan, Jo and Euan, a team of strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the ruthless Chaser, in the first ever Chase New Zealand. Hosted by Paul Henry.

programme.title: 1News At Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: Season Premiere: The show returns with more hopefuls welcomed by the award-winning Ant & Dec before showing their talents to judges Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and new addition KSI.

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent Continued
programme.desc: Season Premiere: The show returns with more hopefuls welcomed by the award-winning Ant & Dec before showing their talents to judges Simon Cowell, Amanda Holden, Alesha Dixon and new addition KSI.

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary weighs up a bold offer from Mr Ryder, and decides what happiness looks like for her.

programme.title: Call The Midwife
programme.desc: Season Finale: Sister Veronica must decide her future as the maternity home prepares to close its doors. The Mullucks fight for the rights of all thalidomide victims.

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: Police and a rescue chopper must save swimmers before they are swept down the rapids. It’s good news for cats but bad news for pavlovas when a truck spills a full load of cream over the highway.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: Series Premiere: 1987. When their households merge, Niall and Ruben form a close and unsettling bond. An intimate yet epic exploration of what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Totally Completely Fine
programme.desc: As John and Vivian go head to head in a mediation over his food truck, Hendrix is pulling out all the stops to save his marriage.

programme.title: Lockerbie: A Search For Truth
programme.desc: As Jim continues his campaign for justice, two suspects are indicted for the bombing and his focus shifts to bringing the men to trial.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Janet and Philip have a wobble in the last stretch of their room renovation. Clive finds cracks in his handy work as a septic tank floods. Tim unexpectedly ends up in a hospital.

programme.title: TVNZ1 Quiz
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Plant and Food Research trials an open-ocean aquaculture system; a visit to a South Waikato Ahuwhenua Award winning dairy farm; and the B Corp certified geothermally-powered milk plant of Miraka.

programme.title: SPCA Rescue
programme.desc: Season Final: A race against time for SPCA staff to save a dog with a harrowing injury, a box of kittens arrive at the Mangere Centre and a dog tied up with a dangerously short chain.

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.

programme.title: Ainsley's Great Garden Cook Off
programme.desc: National treasure Ainsley Harriott challenges some of Britain's best chefs to make inspiring meals from ingredients available in and around a stunning selection of National Trust properties.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: A businessman from Pakistan keeps his visa history under wraps while an American Kiwi lands with a passport that says he’s 6 feet under.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off Extra Slice
programme.desc: Joel Dommett, Finlay Christie and Prue Leith join Jo and Tom to mark Back to School week: whose flapjacks and school cake were top of the class? And whose nostalgic Showstopper sealed their 'fete'?

programme.title: Find My Country House
programme.desc: Aussie homebuyers who love the tranquillity of country life find their perfect country house out in the Australian bush.

programme.title: Here We Go
programme.desc: Suspicions run high when various people start receiving anonymous Valentine's Day cards.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Week By The Sea
programme.desc: This time Susan is off to the UK's sunniest place, Eastbourne on the southeast coast. It's an elegant resort and Susan begins at the beautiful golden pier.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: With the dominant males gone, trouble looms as intruder lions close in on the Xudum pride's young cubs. Leopard Lediba searches for her missing cub after a tense encounter.

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: An environmentally-committed young couple in Christchurch buck convention by going back to the future with a centuries-old building material.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News At Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A South Canterbury family growing organic blackcurrants has created an international business for products they make from the superfood.

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand
programme.desc: A Central Otago vineyard is the breath-taking site for a multi-generational home bringing an extended family back together with the matriarch’s own journey front of mind.

programme.title: My Family Mystery
programme.desc: Season Finale: Melanie uncovers her grandmother's courageous journey to escape the war. While Lisa looks into the origins of her grandmother’s mysterious wedding dress.

programme.title: Britain's Most Expensive Houses
programme.desc: Margaret showcases a £17m manor in Jersey, complete with Versace-style reception rooms, a wine cellar and a labyrinth garden. And there's a tense valuation for Ian on a 16th-century house in Cornwall.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: The Irvines struggle to adjust to their new normal, while also recovering from the fallout of their arguments.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: Riddiculous
programme.desc: Ranvir Singh hosts three teams who will go head-to-head over a series of Riddiculous riddles set by Riddlemaster Henry Lewis!

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Cody and Britta test their mettle when Gwen has a child go missing, and Brad has a child that is all too present.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal UK
programme.desc: Join host Stephen Mulhern for one of the most exciting and iconic gameshows of all time as one of his brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker for a life-changing cash prize.
